heading: Conflicting periods of location of claims
label: 522 Conflicting periods of location of claims

children.label: a
children.text: If any mining claim which shall have been located subsequent to , and prior to , and which shall be entitled to the benefits of this chapter, shall cover any lands embraced within any mining claim which shall have been located prior to , and which shall be entitled to the benefits of this chapter, then as to such area of conflict said mining claim so located subsequent to , shall be deemed to have been located .December 31, 1952December 11, 1953January 1, 1953December 31, 1952December 11, 1953

children.label: b
children.text: If any mining claim hereafter located shall cover any lands embraced within any mining claim which shall have been located prior to , and which shall be entitled to the benefits of this chapter, then as to such area of conflict said mining claim hereafter located shall be deemed to have been located one hundred and twenty-one days after .February 10, 1954August 13, 1954
